examples: Coben is the first author to win all three literary awards: the Edgar award, shamus award and Anthony award.
Prep school kids have, as assistant professor at Columbia University Shamus Raham Khan says, "the ability to treat hierarchies as ladders, not ceilings."
A while back, I met a young man named Shamus at the VFW Hall in East Moline, Illinois. He was a good-looking kid, six-two or six-three, clear-eyed, with an easy smile.
But then I asked myself: Are we serving Shamus as well as he was serving us?
You know, a while back, I met a young man named Shamus at the VFW Hall in East Moline, Illinois.
